# Minneapolis Kitchen & Bath

> Trusted local remodeling contractors for kitchens and bathrooms across the Twin Cities metro.

Minneapolis Kitchen & Bath is a locally owned home remodeling company based in Minneapolis, MN. We specialize in kitchen remodels, bathroom renovations, custom cabinetry, countertop installation, tile and flooring, and full gut renovations.

## Services

- Kitchen Remodeling: Full kitchen renovations from cabinet replacement to complete gut-and-rebuild
- Bathroom Remodeling: Transform any bathroom from powder room to master suite
- Custom Cabinetry: Made-to-order cabinetry for kitchens, bathrooms, and beyond
- Countertops: Quartz, granite, marble, and butcher block sourcing and installation
- Tile & Flooring: Expert tile setting for floors, showers, backsplashes, and feature walls
- Full Gut Renovations: Complete gut renovations under one contract

## Service Areas

Minneapolis, Saint Paul, Edina, Bloomington, Plymouth, Minnetonka, Eden Prairie, Wayzata, Maple Grove, Eagan, Burnsville, Richfield, and the surrounding Twin Cities metro.
